title: cordia nitida
intro: Cordia nitida, also known as the 'White Gymnosperm' or 'Wild Pear', is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and other respiratory issues due to its antipyretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cordia nitida include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Cordia nitida can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
